title: NISST – Technical Manager and Faculty – 6 Posts
shortInfo: National Institute of Secondary Steel Technology (NISST) Recruitment 2026 for 6 posts of Technical Manager and Faculty for Electrician Courses. Candidates with B.E, M.E/M.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NISST official website nisst.org.

basic_details.job_title: NISST Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Technical Manager and Faculty Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Secondary Steel Technology (NISST) Recruitment 2026 for 6 posts of Technical Manager and Faculty for Electrician Courses. Candidates with B.E, M.E/M.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NISST official website nisst.org.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Electrical/Electronic Engineering for Technical Manager and B.E. in Electrical Engineering for Faculty.

salary_details.pay_scale: Upto Rs. 1,25,000/- consolidated per month for Technical Manager; Rs. 1,000/- per hour for Faculty.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NISST Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
